summary: Added a fail-closed validator requiring at least one successful served-deployment verifier row to resolve to the exact deployment_url recorded in the proof. An unrelated successful verifier row can no longer satisfy this boundary.

verification.environment: isolated Node runtime using byte-identical committed module and test content
cases: successful verifier row for another deployment rejected
failed exact row plus unrelated success rejected
missing deployment URL or successful row rejected

limits: The validator is a reusable acceptance boundary and is not yet wired into build-evidence-verification-input.mjs.
URL equality does not prove Cloudflare account ownership, exact deployed commit, continued availability, or scientific truth.
No live Cloudflare deployment occurred because protected Cloudflare credentials remain unavailable.
falsification_routes: Supply a successful verifier row whose resolvedUrl differs from deployment_url and confirm rejection.
Supply the exact URL with a trailing slash difference and confirm canonical equivalence.
Wire the validator into the evidence builder and run the complete Cloudflare test suite.
privacy: No credentials, private chat, health information, diagnosis, or treatment claims are included.
